MAO Order Integration - RoundDownAmount Uses round() Instead Of floor()-To-Hundredths|643877]] RoundDownAmount uses `round()` instead of floor()-to-hundredths (Code Audit Check 90); Leslie's MAO Order Integration queue grew to 3, total active across both owners now 11 (Kyle 8 + Leslie 3). 🟦 LAMPSPLUS-1508 recovered at 06:00 UTC — [[LAMPSPLUS-1508 - Bug -  Address validation component.|LAMPSPLUS-1508]] Address validation component Critical/Needs Attention 25% → Critical/In Progress 50%, still Unassigned, still 7 days overdue. 🔴 NEW P1 MAO Order Integration bug at 05:00 UTC — Leslie this time — [[734544 - LAMPSPLUS-1070 Tealium view_item advanced from In Progress 50% to Ready For UAT In Stage 100% under Leslie, clearing the headline analytics regression. Regression cleared: [[LAMPSPLUS-1383 - MAO NEW ORDER JSON - Bundle Product-Configurable Products - Do not send parent sku\|LAMPSPLUS-1383]] MAO Bundle parent_sku flipped from Failed-Production back to Passed-Production within the same cycle. Regression cleared: [[LAMPSPLUS-1079 - Data Layer Event List - Purchase -Tealium-\|LAMPSPLUS-1079]] Purchase Tealium recovered to Ready For UAT In Stage 100% after midday regression to In Progress 50%.
